overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval fantasy city. The character approaches a large stone gate, passes through a torch-lit tunnel, and emerges into a bustling cobblestone city square with half-timbered houses, continuing through narrower streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone road approaching fortified city gate

events.description: Geralt enters the shadow of the main gate archway

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily up the cobblestone path toward the city gate

entered.detail: Large stone archway with portcullis forming the main city entrance
Thick medieval stone walls flanking the gate approach
Worn cobblestone path leading up to the gate
Grassy embankment alongside the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt approaching a massive stone city gate from the outside. The cobblestone road leads up to the arched entrance flanked by high stone curtain walls, with sparse vegetation visible on the grassy verges in the morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone gate passage with torch lighting

events.description: Entering the dark gate tunnel with warm torch light replacing sunlight
Exiting the tunnel back into natural daylight

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the gate tunnel passing guards and villagers

notable_agents.action: Guard in red armor standing watch by the tunnel wall
Villager in simple clothing walking toward the exit

entered.detail: Series of stone arches forming the covered tunnel passage
Iron wall-mounted torches providing warm flickering light
Construction scaffolding visible above in the tunnel ceiling
Wooden handcart parked against the tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the dark stone tunnel of the city gate, illuminated by wall-mounted torches. The enclosed space features wooden scaffolding overhead and various NPCs including guards and villagers moving through the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval city square with half-timbered merchant houses

events.description: Exiting the gate tunnel into the open city square with half-timbered buildings
Turning right into a narrower street corridor

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the city square observing the surroundings and passing various townsfolk

notable_agents.action: Children playing on stone steps beside a half-timbered house

entered.detail: Traditional medieval half-timbered building with exposed wooden beams
Tall stone tower with red spire visible in the distance
Wooden market stall with canvas covering
External stone staircase attached to the building facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate into a sunlit medieval city square, Geralt walks past half-timbered houses and a market stall. Children play on stone steps to the right while a distant tower spire rises above the rooftops, and the street opens into a wider cobblestone plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval street with overhanging timber buildings

events.description: Entering a narrower street with buildings close on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the narrow streets toward a distant archway

notable_agents.action: Villager in brown tunic walking alongside the wall

entered.detail: Medieval timber-framed building with upper floors overhanging the street
Distant stone archway marking the end of the narrow street
Stone wall covered in climbing ivy and vegetation
Heavy wooden door with iron studs set in the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The street narrows into a confined passage with overhanging timber buildings and ivy-covered stone walls. Geralt walks toward a distant stone archway while a villager walks alongside, the lighting becoming more diffused as the buildings create shadows over the cobblestone path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt transitions from the open outskirts of a fortress into the dense, shadowed corridors of a medieval city. It begins with an approach toward a massive stone city gate, moving along a cobblestone road flanked by high curtain walls and grassy verges in the morning light. As the camera passes through the arched entrance, the environment shifts into a dark stone tunnel illuminated by wall-mounted torches and crowded with guards and villagers beneath wooden scaffolding. The scene then opens into a sunlit city square filled with half-timbered houses and market stalls, where the view expands to reveal a distant tower spire rising above a wide cobblestone plaza. Finally, the path narrows into a confined passage of overhanging timber buildings and ivy-covered walls, with the lighting becoming diffused as the camera follows Geralt toward a distant stone archway.
